description_long: This is a set of light wood cabinets and drawers arranged against a corner wall, featuring a natural, unfinished appearance. The left side consists of two base cabinets, one with a visible open top and the other with a closed top, both with recessed handles. To the right, a smaller standalone chest of drawers with three visible drawers is present, also with recessed handles. The cabinets and drawers are elevated slightly above the floor on short legs, giving them a modern, minimalistic look. The surfaces are flat and smooth, suitable for supporting objects or appliances. The overall design is functional and utilitarian, ideal for storage in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or utility rooms.
description: A set of light wood cabinets and drawers with recessed handles, flat surfaces, and a minimalistic, functional design. The arrangement includes two base cabinets and a smaller chest of drawers, all elevated on short legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full arrangement of two base cabinets and a chest of drawers, with visible recessed handles and flat tops.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the cabinets and the alignment against the wall, with the open top of one cabinet visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain back panels of the cabinets and drawers, with no handles or openings visible.
description_view_3: Side view from the opposite end, displaying the solid side panel and the depth of the arrangement.
